Explore Programs
Woodstock · Hudson Valley · New York

Find stillness.
Cultivate compassion.
Live fully.

We offer meditation courses and contemplative practice rooted in Buddhist wisdom — simple, accessible, and open to everyone.

Explore Programs Our Approach

Meditation

Simple, proven techniques for settling the mind — taught step by step from the very beginning.

Compassion

Training the heart through Lojong — practical tools for genuine kindness toward yourself and others.

Community

A warm, inclusive sangha where practitioners of all backgrounds are welcomed exactly as they are.

Retreats

From half-day sittings to multi-day residentials in the beauty of the Hudson Valley.

Programs

Current courses & classes

All programmes are open to everyone, regardless of background or belief. Sliding scale fees available.

8-week course

Introduction to Meditation

Learn to settle your mind and find genuine peace. This friendly, step-by-step course introduces the core techniques of Buddhist meditation in a completely accessible way — no experience, no belief required.

🕐 Tuesdays 7:00–9:00pm $195 · sliding scale available
8-week course

The Compassionate Heart

A transformative eight-week programme in the Tibetan Buddhist art of mind training. Learn to work with difficult emotions, cultivate genuine kindness, and develop the courage to open your heart to yourself and others.

🕐 Thursdays 7:00–9:00pm $195 · sliding scale available
6-week course

Mindful Living

A six-week exploration of how meditation practice can transform the way we live, work, and relate. Practical, grounded, and immediately applicable to the challenges of modern life.

🕐 Wednesdays 6:30–8:30pm $145 · sliding scale available
View all programs →
About Stillwater

Non-sectarian, welcoming, grounded

Stillwater draws on the wisdom of multiple Buddhist traditions — Tibetan, Zen, and Theravada — offering what is most helpful without demanding you adopt any particular belief system.

Our courses share simple meditation techniques and methods for training in compassion, developed over centuries yet directly relevant to the challenges of everyday life: stress, anxiety, difficult relationships, and the search for meaning.

We are based in Woodstock, NY and offer in-person programmes at our centre, as well as occasional online sessions.

Learn about our approach

"Meditation and compassion have been shown to be beneficial in many ways — bringing peace of mind, tackling stress, depression and other mental health challenges, and helping us develop more kindness for ourselves and those around us."

The Stillwater approach
